title: This Cancer Is Not Incurable (Anymore)
description:
Scientists just found a new way to treat a cancer we thought was incurable! You have important immune cells in your blood that fight infections, called T-cells, but in this rare disease, the T-cells turn cancerous.

So researchers took healthy T-cells from a donor and used a NEW technique to not only make them cancer fighting cells, but also invisible to other cancer treatments and EACH OTHER! 

For more optimistic science and tech stories, subscribe!

DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa2505478

#cancer #science #medicine #biology #shorts
